subject: Add INFO.yaml file
commit_message:
Add INFO.yaml file

Add INFO.yaml to list:
- Project description
- Properties
- PTL information
- Meeting information
- Committer information

Change-Id: Ie814aa9248653615ed2acd33218520b12a0cd0e5
Issue-ID: CIMAN-134
Signed-off-by: Jessica Wagantall <jwagantall@linuxfoundation.org>
